title: Temporal Fitness Half-Life — CodebaseStateVector + FitnessDecayScorer

invariants_introduced.description: Decay re-evaluation is read-only — FitnessDecayEvent is a NEW append, never modifies original record
Identical codebase state + decay params → identical adjusted scores and drift magnitudes
CodebaseStateVector is frozen/immutable — created once, never modified
Decay model: adjusted = recorded × exp(-k × drift), k=2.0 default, clamped [0,1]
FitnessDecayEvent emitted to LineageLedgerV2 when adjusted_score < 0.60 threshold
Module never imports or invokes GovernanceGate — advisory only
Vector fingerprints only the relevant region, not the whole repo — bounded computation

novelty: First governance-anchored mutation system to model fitness decay over time. Past 'good' decisions are continuously re-evaluated as surrounding code evolves. Decay uses exponential model (exp(-k×drift)) with CodebaseStateVector drift computed from AST node deltas, cyclomatic complexity deltas, and source digest comparisons.
